settings.subtitle: For After
settings.description:
Recovery rebuilds the skin barrier broken down by miles. Ceramides restore lipid layers compromised by friction and sweat. Anti-inflammatory botanicals reduce the cellular stress that accumulates over training blocks. This isn't comfort—it's maintenance. The ritual that lets you run again tomorrow, and the day after, and for decades.

Barrier Repair Technology: Pharmaceutical-grade ceramide complex combined with anti-inflammatory botanicals. Clinically proven to accelerate skin barrier recovery and reduce inflammation markers post-exercise.

Dermatologist Tested: Restorative treatment formula suitable for compromised skin barriers. Hypoallergenic. Fragrance-free therapeutic grade.
settings.how_to_apply:
Apply to clean skin within 30-60 minutes post-run—the barrier repair window. Focus on areas that experienced friction during the effort. Use on intact skin for prevention, or on areas showing early irritation (redness, sensitivity) before they progress to open chafing.

Can also be used nightly during high-volume training blocks as preventive skin conditioning.
settings.ingredients_list: Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Squalane, Ceramide NP, Ceramide AP, Ceramide EOP, Niacinamide, Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5), Centella Asiatica (Cica) Extract, Bisabolol, Allantoin, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Cholesterol, Phytosphingosine
settings.shipping_info: Free shipping on orders over $50. Standard shipping: 3-5 business days.
settings.cross_sell_text: Preventing is better than repairing. Pair with Aura Stride for daily training protection or Aura Ultra for race day.

settings.heading: Key Ingredients
settings.description: Formulated for post-race recovery, soothing irritated skin and accelerating the healing process.

settings.name: Aloe Vera
settings.description: Provides immediate cooling relief to irritated, chafed skin after long efforts.

settings.name: Shea Butter
settings.description: Rich in vitamins A and E, deeply nourishes and repairs damaged skin barriers.

settings.name: Vitamin E
settings.description: Combats free radical damage from UV exposure during outdoor training.

settings.quote: After a 50-miler, Aura Recover is the first thing I reach for. The relief is immediate.
settings.author: Chris T.
